name: SI-eligibility evidence pack (FMP-liftable)

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 2(17) (DNSH + good-governance constituents of the sustainable investment definition)
Annex II / Annex III / Annex IV / Annex V (pre-contractual and periodic disclosure templates referenced by the FMP)

summary: Evidence-pack quality test: five required components packaged for FMP lift — (1) contribution attestation (criterion 8 result, auditor-reviewed), (2) DNSH attestation (criterion 4 result), (3) good-governance attestation (criterion 2 result), (4) machine-readable PAI data file (criterion 10 result), (5) documentation completeness (recency, version-control). Cascade rules are load-bearing: criterion 8 not_aligned, criterion 4 not_aligned, or criterion 2 not_aligned each force criterion 9 not_aligned (Art 2(17)'s explicit DNSH and good-governance gates).
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the SI definition and its DNSH / good-governance constituents are expected to be retained as core gates for the highest-tier category. PB Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.4 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
